notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes an ongoing battle scene with multiple actors (Fang Yuan, Zizai Scholar, Pi Shuihan, Can Yang Laojun, Dongfang Changfan's star will, etc.) but the events are all publicly observable combat actions. No private knowledge, secret plans, future-known information, or knowledge gaps are directly supported by the source text. The relations and events are all visible to participants/observers in the scene. There is no hidden fact that can be extracted without speculating or extrapolating beyond what the source directly supports.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows multiple characters in combat situations (方源 vs 自在书生/皮水寒, 残阳老君 vs 东方一族), but observed actions are purely tactical combat moves without clear motive indicators. Characters' behaviors are driven by immediate combat circumstances rather than revealing deeper motives. For example, 方源 uses force palms to break 东方长凡's arrangements - this is a tactical combat action, not a motive-revealing behavior. 黎山仙子 wants to help 方源 but is dissuaded - this shows intent to assist but the motive behind it (alliance, friendship, self-interest) is ambiguous. 残阳老君 kills people but the seed doesn't reveal why. Without direct source support for underlying motives, any inferred motive would be a psychological leap.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains mostly individual actors (方源, 自在书生, 皮水寒, 黑楼兰, 黎山仙子, 东方长凡, 残阳老君, 东方余亮) with no named collective faction/group that has a concrete stake in the seed facts.

东方一族 (Dongfang clan) appears in events (东方一族准备铲除内奸) and relations (残阳老君暗算东方余亮), but the seed does not provide enough concrete stake for the clan as a collective actor — the events focus on individual conflicts (残阳老君 vs 东方余亮, 残阳老君 vs 谭武枫/东破空).
八位东方部族的蛊仙 are mentioned as summoned by 东方长凡's star will, but they are unnamed and lack a clear collective stake beyond being summoned.
No named faction/clan/family with a clear collective interest, threat, resource, reputation, geography, succession, or inheritance pressure is sufficiently established in this seed.
IF export filter quarantined 6 legacy old-schema branches.
